positive: A whimsical, repeating seamless pattern featuring stylized constellations and glowing celestial animals like ethereal foxes and nebula-winged owls. The style is Art Nouveau meets retro psychedelia, rendered with thick, clean line art and flat, vibrant colors (deep indigo, cosmic teal, vibrant gold, and soft lavender). The composition must be centered and highly modular for apparel printing, emphasizing strong negative space and perfect symmetry. Dramatic rim lighting, high contrast, vector illustration quality, suitable for sublimation printing. --ar 1:1 --v 6.0
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, messy lines, low resolution, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, --ar 1:1
